name: l2_powered_source_acceptance_budget_gate

name: l2_powered_source_acceptance_handoff

name: l2_powered_source_validation_error_budget

note: Validation budget readiness and blocker input.

name: l2_powered_source_validation_run_matrix

note: Validation run status behind both upstream inputs.

name: l2_powered_hover_cruise_acceptance_gates

note: Downstream acceptance targets stay closed until evidence is mature.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
